title: Positive flow: Navigate to the search screen and view the list of off-air stations
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the home screen
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the search icon in the header | Verify that the screen displays the title 'SEARCH' and subtitle 'OFF AIR' | Scroll through the list of radio stations or music channels | Verify that each list item contains an icon, a name, and an 'Off-air' label
expected_result: The screen displays the title 'SEARCH' and subtitle 'OFF AIR' | The list of radio stations or music channels is visible | Each list item contains an icon, a name, and an 'Off-air' label

title: Negative flow: Attempt to search for a non-existent station
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the search screen
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the search icon in the header | Enter a non-existent station name in the search bar | Press the search button | Verify that no results are displayed
expected_result: No results are displayed for the non-existent station name

title: UI test: Verify the visibility of the 'Off-air' label
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the search screen
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the search icon in the header | Scroll through the list of radio stations or music channels | Verify that each list item contains an 'Off-air' label
expected_result: Each list item contains an 'Off-air' label

title: Accessibility test: Verify that the screen is accessible to users with visual impairments
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the search screen
test_steps: Open the app | Enable screen reader mode | Navigate to the search screen | Verify that the screen is accessible to users with visual impairments
expected_result: The screen is accessible to users with visual impairments

title: Usability test: Verify that the user can easily navigate through the list of off-air stations
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the search screen
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the search icon in the header | Scroll through the list of radio stations or music channels | Verify that the user can easily navigate through the list
expected_result: The user can easily navigate through the list of radio stations or music channels

title: Data persistence test: Verify that the list of off-air stations is retained after app restart
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the search screen
test_steps: Open the app | Click on the search icon in the header | Scroll through the list of radio stations or music channels | Restart the app | Verify that the list of off-air stations is retained
expected_result: The list of off-air stations is retained after app restart
